next_steps: Perform urinary antigen testing for Legionella species
Initiate hemodialysis for management of acute kidney injury and electrolyte imbalances
Collect lower respiratory tract secretions for culture and molecular diagnostics
Obtain inflammatory markers (ferritin, LDH, triglycerides) and soluble IL-2 receptor
Continue broad-spectrum antibiotics covering atypical pathogens
Consider muscle biopsy if rhabdomyolysis persists without infectious etiology
